subject: Air Wisconsin Flight 965
object: Air Wisconsin Flight 965 was a scheduled passenger flight from Chicago O'Hare International Airport to Appleton, Wisconsin that crashed on June 8, 1980 near Valley, Nebraska, killing all 13 people on board (11 passengers and 2 crew). The Swearingen SA226-TC Metro II aircraft encountered instrument meteorological conditions and the pilot experienced spatial disorientation, resulting in an uncontrolled descent into terrain.

subject: Gali Guleiyan
object: Khuddoos, a reclusive and paranoid man living in the narrow lanes of Old Delhi, spends his days spying on his neighbors through CCTV cameras. He becomes obsessed with saving a young boy named Idris who is being physically and emotionally abused by his father. As Khuddoos attempts to rescue the child, his own grip on reality deteriorates, blurring the lines between his traumatic past and present. The film explores themes of isolation, mental illness, child abuse, and the claustrophobic environment of Old Delhi's ancient alleyways.
